selected_figma_slice: Admin import temporary credential route/data/permission/state handoff

active_figma.file_name: Senior Capstone App - Product UI System Recreated
active_figma.frame_name: Prototype / 22 / Admin import temporary credential handoff

guardrails: Temporary credentials are shown once only in the immediate admin response.
Credential values are never recorded in audit metadata, Figma, docs, screenshots, logs, commits, or chat.
Pending-reset users must complete reset before any role dashboard renders.
Duplicate emails and invalid program/cohort scopes block import submit.
Permission-denied attempts write redacted audit events.
Only fake .test users are used for proof.
acceptance_checks: Admin import requires users.manage and an explicit reason.
Validation states are visible before submit is accepted.
One-time temporary credential display is no-store and not replayable.
Reset-required first login routes through complete-reset before workspace role views.
Denied roles cannot infer imported user data or credential details.

implementation_handoff.next_action: Build hosted/admin UI proof for /api/admin/users/import, no-store one-time credential display, duplicate/scope validation states, permission-denied audit proof, and decide credential delivery before real pilot users.

validation.figma: metadata/readback plus screenshot verification succeeded before repo docs closeout
validation.repo: docs/artifacts.json parsed; structured manifest parsed; verify-cadence-30min.ps1 passed; git diff --check passed with CRLF warnings only
